description: History Delete Hint - Add visual hint showing users can press 'x' to delete selected history entry

userStories.title: Show delete hint in help text when entry selected
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see that I can press 'x' to delete so I can remove unwanted history entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Help text shows 'x Delete' when a history entry is selected
Delete hint not shown when no entry is selected
Hint integrates with existing help text style (e.g., '↑/↓ Navigate  Enter Select  x Delete  Esc Quit')
